name: NIST AI RMF: MEASURE — Transparency & Explainability
description: The AI system is measured for the accountable-&-transparent and explainable-&-interpretable characteristics.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MEASURE 2: trustworthy characteristics include accountable & transparent and explainable & interpretable.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
